response:
An API is a way for two different apps or services to talk to each other and share information.

A simple way to think about it:
• It works like a waiter in a restaurant.  
• You tell the waiter what you want.  
• The waiter goes to the kitchen and passes along your request.  
• The kitchen prepares it.  
• The waiter brings the result back to you.  

In the same way, an API takes a request from one app, passes it to another app, and brings back the answer. This lets different apps work together smoothly without you needing to know how they do it behind the scenes.
